user.title: Tesla Solar Charger
user.description: Configure your Tesla Solar Charger integration to automatically adjust charging based on excess solar power.

data.name: Name
data.battery_soc_sensor: Home Battery State of Charge Sensor (optional)
data.battery_power_positive_is_charging: Battery power: positive value means charging

data_description.name: A friendly name for this integration instance. Used for device and entity naming.
data_description.production_sensor: Select the sensor that measures your solar panel output power. Must report in W (watts) or kW (kilowatts). Typically from your solar inverter integration.
data_description.consumption_sensors: Select one or more sensors measuring total home power consumption. Must report in W or kW. If you have multiple CT clamps or meters, select all of them.
data_description.consumption_excludes_charging: Enable ONLY if your consumption sensor circuit does NOT include the EV charger. Leave OFF for most installations where the main meter sees all loads including EV charging.
data_description.amps_number: Select the number entity from your ESPHome Tesla BLE proxy that controls charging amperage. This is typically named something like 'Charging Amps' or 'Charge Current Limit'.
data_description.charging_switch: Select the switch entity from your ESPHome Tesla BLE proxy that starts/stops charging. This is typically named 'Charging' or 'Charge Enable'.
data_description.charging_state_sensor: Select the sensor showing IEC 61851 charging state from your ESPHome BLE proxy. Values like 'Charging', 'Stopped', 'Disconnected'. Used to detect if car is plugged in.
data_description.voltage: Your local grid voltage. Use 230V for Europe/Australia, 240V for UK, or 120V for North America. Used to calculate watts from amps.
data_description.battery_power_sensor: Optional. Sensor reporting home-battery instantaneous power in W or kW. Required together with the SoC sensor to enable battery-aware charging.
data_description.battery_soc_sensor: Optional. Sensor reporting home-battery state of charge as a percentage. Required together with the power sensor.
data_description.battery_power_positive_is_charging: Some battery integrations report charging as positive watts; others report discharging as positive. If your sensor reads positive while the battery is charging, leave this on. If positive means discharging, turn it off.

error.invalid_power_unit: Selected sensor must have unit_of_measurement of W or kW. Please select a power sensor.
error.no_consumption_sensors: At least one consumption sensor is required to calculate excess solar power.
error.battery_pair_incomplete: Both the battery power sensor and the battery state of charge sensor must be selected, or neither.
error.invalid_battery_soc_unit: The battery state of charge sensor must have unit_of_measurement of %.

abort.already_configured: This integration is already configured. Use the Options button to modify settings.

init.title: Tesla Solar Charger Options
init.description: Adjust charging behavior, timing, and sensor configuration.

data.name: Name
data.battery_soc_sensor: Home Battery State of Charge Sensor (optional)
data.battery_power_positive_is_charging: Battery power: positive value means charging

data_description.name: A friendly name for this integration instance.
data_description.production_sensor: Sensor measuring solar production in W or kW.
data_description.consumption_sensors: One or more sensors measuring home consumption in W or kW.
data_description.consumption_excludes_charging: Enable ONLY if your consumption sensor does NOT include the EV charger circuit.
data_description.amps_number: The ESPHome BLE proxy's charging amps number entity.
data_description.charging_switch: The ESPHome BLE proxy's charging switch entity.
data_description.charging_state_sensor: The IEC 61851 state sensor from the BLE proxy.
data_description.voltage: Your local grid voltage (230V EU, 240V UK, 120V US). Used for watts/amps conversion.
data_description.battery_power_sensor: Optional. Sensor reporting home-battery instantaneous power in W or kW. Required together with the SoC sensor.
data_description.battery_soc_sensor: Optional. Sensor reporting home-battery state of charge as a percentage. Required together with the power sensor.
data_description.battery_power_positive_is_charging: Sign convention for the battery power sensor. On: positive watts = charging. Off: positive watts = discharging.
